intro: Oxydectes dichroa, also known as Dichroa febrifuga, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, commonly used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Oxydectes dichroa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and treat various other infectious diseases, making it a valuable remedy in the treatment of fever and infections. The bioactive constituents of Oxydectes dichroa include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
